summary: The parallel/test-debugger-exec test timed out waiting for a debugger output pattern and failed one test during the release test-debugger-exec run.
root_cause: The test timed out waiting for the expected debugger prompt/match: Error: Timeout (15000) while waiting for /break (?:on start )?in/i as raised from test/common/debugger.js while running parallel/test-debugger-exec.js.

evidence.quote: Error: Timeout (15000) while waiting for /break (?:on start )?in/i
evidence.reason: Shows the test failed due to a timeout waiting for the specified regex pattern.
Indicates the timeout error was raised from test/common/debugger.js at line 92 (where the wait-for-timeout is thrown).
Identifies the failing test suite run (release test-debugger-exec).
Shows the exact test command that was executed and failed.
Captured debugger output confirms the debugger started/listened but the expected pattern was not observed before the timeout.

suggested_fix: Re-run the failing test command locally to reproduce: out/Release/node test/parallel/test-debugger-exec.js. If the debugger prompt can be slow on CI, consider increasing the TIMEOUT used in test/common/debugger.js or adjust the waitFor pattern to match the actual debugger output; investigate why the expected '/break ... in' text did not appear in the captured output.
